channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇯🇵💰 Toyota Warns of $4.3 Billion Hit from Iran War
item.description: Japan's Toyota expects the Iran conflict to cost it about $4.3 billion this financial year, one of the most significant corporate warnings yet on the wider economic impact of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: 🇬🇧🗳️ UK Labour Party Suffers Heavy Losses as Reform UK Surges
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to fight on after his Labour Party suffered heavy losses in local elections, with Nigel Farage's Reform UK making significant gains that deepened doubts over Labour's ability to govern.

item.title: 🛢️⚠️ IEA Warns Energy Markets Headed Into Troubled Waters
item.description: Global energy markets are headed into "troubled waters" as the Iran war continues to knock out millions of barrels of oil each day, IEA head Fatih Birol warned, saying Europe made a mistake moving away from nuclear power.

item.title: 🇮🇷🚢 Iran Seizes Oil Tanker as US Disables Two Ships in Gulf
item.description: Iran said it seized an oil tanker over attempts to disrupt its exports, hours after US and Iranian forces exchanged fire in the Strait of Hormuz, with US forces firing on and disabling two Iranian tankers.

item.title: 📈🌍 Seven Markets to Track If Peace Breaks Out in Middle East
item.description: A durable peace breakthrough in the Middle East would ripple through markets far beyond crude oil, quickly stripping out risk premia baked into freight rates, fertilizer prices and more.

item.title: ⚖️ US Trade Court Rules Trump Tariffs Illegal, Blocks 10% Global Levy
item.description: A federal trade court ruled that President Trump exceeded his authority with new 10% global tariffs, though the order only applies to importers who sued. The administration plans to appeal.

item.title: ⚔️ US Navy Came Under Iranian Missile Fire After Attacking Oil Tanker
item.description: Iranian state media reports US naval forces in the Strait of Hormuz came under missile fire following a US attack on an Iranian oil tanker, marking a significant escalation in the Gulf conflict.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Deploys Artillery at Border to Hit Seoul
item.description: Kim Jong Un inspected production of artillery with 60km+ range to be deployed at the South Korean border, bolstering its ability to strike Seoul and other targets.

item.title: 💥 China Fireworks Factory Blast Kills 37, One Missing
item.description: The death toll from a fireworks factory explosion in Hunan province rose to 37 with one person still missing, making it China's deadliest industrial blast since 2019.

item.title: 🇮🇷 US Disables Two More Iranian Tankers as Hormuz Tensions Rise
item.description: The US military fired on and disabled two additional Iranian tankers amid escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, as the UAE announced air defenses engaging threats.

item.title: 🤖🇺🇸 US Marine Corps Seeks Robots to Build Expeditionary Airfields
item.description: The Marine Corps is developing robotic systems to construct forward airfields, part of its Force Design 2030 modernization. The initiative aims to reduce personnel needs and speed up deployment in contested environments.

item.title: 🇺🇦⛽ Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Refinery in Perm for Third Time
item.description: Ukrainian forces hit the Lukoil-Permnefteorgsintez refinery in Perm, marking the third strike on the facility in two weeks. The attacks are part of Ukraine's campaign against Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🤖⚔️ Ukraine Deploys 25,000 Ground Robots for Front-Line Combat
item.description: Ukraine is producing 25,000 unmanned ground vehicles to serve as "cavalry" on the front lines, reducing casualties and replacing lost hardware. The robots represent a major shift in modern warfare tactics.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine Trade Ceasefire Accusations as Moscow Prepares Victory Day Parade
item.description: Both nations accused each other of violating ceasefires ahead of Russia's WWII commemoration under tight security, while fighting continues despite temporary truces.

item.title: 🛡️ Ukraine Running Short on Air Defence Missiles After Winter Campaign
item.description: Ukraine's air force warned it is running low on air defence missiles following Russia's massive winter attacks, as it braces for further strikes.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Exports Surge as Companies Stockpile Amid Iran War Fears
item.description: Chinese export growth quickened in April as firms rushed to stockpile components, worried the Iran conflict could push input costs higher.

item.title: 🎖️ Victory Day Reveals Putins War Dilemma
item.description: Russia's low-key WWII commemorations highlight tensions as Moscow prepares its annual parade under heightened security amid the ongoing Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚔️ US and Iran clash in Strait of Hormuz as Tehran mulls ceasefire proposal
item.description: US forces carried out retaliatory strikes on Iranian targets after Tehran attacked destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz. Washington awaits Irans response to a ceasefire proposal as Trump insists the truce still holds.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛡️💥 NPR: UAE intercepts missiles as US-Iran fighting flares
item.description: The UAE engaged air defenses against Iranian missiles and drones as the US-Iran ceasefire frayed. Washington expects Irans response to its peace proposal later on Friday.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦⏸️ Rubio admits US peace mediation in Ukraine has stalled
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio acknowledged that US efforts to broker peace in Ukraine have not led to a fruitful outcome so far, marking a frank admission of the diplomatic deadlock.

item.title: 🛢️ Russian air defenses struggle to protect oil refineries from Ukrainian drone campaign
item.description: Analysis explains why Ukraine keeps striking the Tuapse oil terminal on Russia Black Sea coast despite Russias massive air defense network. Infrastructure dispersion and fuel flammability create structural vulnerabilities that even Pantsir systems cannot fully address.

item.title: 🇪🇺 European NATO members step up as US role in alliance recedes amid Iran war tensions
item.description: Trump decision to strike Iran without NATO consultation has inflamed tensions with European allies. US announces 5,000 troop withdrawal from Germany, while Spain refused access to joint bases and Britain distanced itself from US Iran policy.

item.title: 🇮🇹🇺🇸 Meloni Meets Rubio as Iran War Strains Italy-US Ties
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni held talks with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio amid unusual strain between Rome and the Trump administration over the Iran conflict, highlighting diverging European and American approaches to the crisis.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇺🇸 Trump Announces Withdrawal of 5,000 US Troops from Germany
item.description: President Donald Trump announced he will withdraw 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany as a rift over the Iran war widens between Washington and NATO allies, raising questions about the legal and practical implications of such a move.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸💻 US Suspects Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China via Thailand
item.description: A firm linked to Thailand's national AI initiative is suspected of helping smuggle billions of dollars worth of servers containing advanced Nvidia chips to China, Bloomberg reported, citing sources familiar with the matter.
